name: open-maintainer

commands.name: build
commands.command: bun run --cwd packages/shared build && bun run --cwd packages/triage build && bun run --cwd packages/ai build && bun run --cwd packages/review build && bun run --cwd packages/db build && bun run --cwd packages/config build && bun run --cwd packages/github build && bun run --cwd packages/analyzer build && bun run --cwd packages/context build && bun run --cwd apps/cli build && bun run --cwd apps/api build && bun run --cwd apps/worker build && bun run --cwd apps/web build

detectedRiskAreas: Authentication, secret, payment, or security-sensitive paths are present.
reviewRuleCandidates: Use bun for dependency and script commands.
Run `cd apps/api && tsc -p tsconfig.json` before finishing changes that affect build.
Run `cd apps/cli && tsc -p tsconfig.json` before finishing changes that affect build.
Run `cd apps/web && next build` before finishing changes that affect build.
Run `cd apps/worker && tsc -p tsconfig.json` before finishing changes that affect build.
Run `biome check .` before finishing changes that affect lint.
Run `tsc -b` before finishing changes that affect typecheck.
Run `vitest run` before finishing changes that affect test.
